default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on new content, traffic, and the critical publishing automation blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Automation Is the Top Priority:** The feature is blocked, creating a large content backlog and preventing Sunbit from realizing value from the service.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**New Content Batch Ready:** 25 articles are complete, including 9 case studies, with \~70 more customer data points available for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [**Traffic Dip & Analytics Issue:** Organic traffic fell to 425 sessions (Oct 12–18). Key event tracking appears broken, showing an inflated 325 events (vs. a typical 46–98) that are all misattributed to "shop directory views."](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Content Cluster Names Standardized:** To enable the automation, cluster names must now match Sunbit's blog categories (e.g., "B2B Auto" → "auto").](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

## Topics

### Publishing Automation Blocker

  - [**Problem:** The publishing automation feature is blocked, preventing all new content from going live.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Impact:** A large content backlog is accumulating, preventing Sunbit from realizing value from the service.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Urgency:** Jason stressed that this is the top priority for making the partnership work, as the delay is "bordering on unacceptable."](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Required Action:** Ehtisham must get an ETA from developers and push for expedited completion.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Content Production & Standardization

  - [**New Batch:** 25 articles are complete, including 9 case studies and 16 B2C cost articles.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [**Future Pipeline:** The case study volume will increase, supported by \~70 customer data points available for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [**Standardization for Automation:** To enable the publishing webhook, content cluster names must be updated to match Sunbit's blog categories.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [B2B Auto → `auto`](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [B2B Dental → `dental`](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [B2C Auto → `automotive tips`](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [B2C Dental → `dental tips`](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Case Studies:** These will be published to the main blog and do not require a separate cluster name.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

### Organic Traffic & Analytics

  - [**Performance (Oct 12–18):**](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [Sessions: 425 (down from 433)](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [Active Users: 387](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [New Users: Stable](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [Engagement Time: Stable](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Issue:** Key event tracking appears broken, showing an inflated 325 events (vs. a typical 46–98).](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Cause:** All events are misattributed to "shop directory views," even on B2B articles where "become a partner" clicks are expected.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**Significance:** This renders event data unreliable for ROI analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**Trend:** The dip is attributed to ranking drops on a few articles. There are no 404 errors, a positive sign.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ehtisham:**](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Get an ETA from developers for the publishing automation feature.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Push for expedited completion of the automation.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Update all content cluster names to match the new blog categories.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [Monitor traffic next week to see if the dip is a trend or an anomaly.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the new case study template via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Once the automation is live, create a plan to push the entire content backlog through the new webhook.](https://fathom.video/share/d-zDFBg7UHYC-m3zsmhEEwGxQxUW1LES?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

action_items.description: Update clusters in OS + docs to match blog categories; then apply to current batch
Escalate publishing automation w/ devs + Kyle; then share ETA w/ Jason, test webhook, push backlog
